basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad (IIT Dharwad) Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Dharwad. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Dharwad Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks
qualification.details: Post graduate in any social science discipline with minimum 55% marks.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Dharwad Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Dharwad Field Investigator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Field Investigator post at IIT Dharwad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Field Investigator position at IIT Dharwad is 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a postgraduate degree in any social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Field Investigator post is 35 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the summary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Field Investigator post at IIT Dharwad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online for the Field Investigator recruitment through the official IIT Dharwad website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITDH/HEART/DC/2025-26/25/ICSSR/003.

faq.question: Q10. In which state and city is IIT Dharwad located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Dharwad is located in Dharwad, Karnataka.
